_comment: NPC: Governor Bai (白太守). INFERRED: Tian Shui's governor. The city's divination culture means the governor consults fortune tellers like Gao Qiming for political decisions.. Derivation: I = INFERRED.
name: Governor Bai
personality: calculating, believes in fate, delegates to diviners
note: INFERRED: Tian Shui's governor. The city's divination culture means the governor consults fortune tellers like Gao Qiming for political decisions.
initiation_lines: Welcome to Tian Shui City, where heaven and water meet. I am Governor Bai. I trust your arrival was foretold.
Gao Qiming predicted a cultivator of unusual destiny would visit this month. I wonder if that is you.
The diviners advise caution in our dealings with the Teng family. Heaven's will is not always clear.
The governor mansion's treasury funds the temple district. Faith and governance are intertwined here.

sect_tasks.description: Governor Bai strokes his beard: 'The seasonal tribute from the outer villages is due. Bring me wheat as proof of collection. The diviners say a bountiful harvest this year.'
Governor Bai nods: 'The temple requires emeralds for the fortune-telling ceremony. Bring me gold and I will convert it to the temple's offering. Heaven rewards generosity.'
